title: Week 12 - Integrated Math Algorithm Projects
description: Practice combining array statistics and classification.

questions.title: Class Score Analysis

description.statement: Return the total score and the number of passing scores.
description.output: Two return values: total and pass count.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(scores)
    local total = 0
    local passCount = 0
    for i = 1, #scores do
        total = total + scores[i]
        if scores[i] >= 60 then
            passCount = passCount + 1
        end
    end
    return total, passCount
end
